title: teucrium aristatum subsp. cravense
intro: Teucrium aristatum subsp. cravense, also known as Teucrium cravense, is a subspecies of perennial herbaceous plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Teucrium cravense include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Teucrium cravense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
